title: TMDB Movies — Clean & Current
subtitle: 1.17M live TMDB movies — deleted entries removed, refreshed daily
description:
## TMDB Movies — Clean & Current

A cleaned and refreshed version of the TMDB movie corpus.

### What makes this different from other TMDB datasets

The widely-used [asaniczka TMDB snapshot](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/asaniczka/tmdb-movies-dataset-2023-930k-movies) contains ~1.38M movies, but **214K of those entries (15.5%) have since been deleted from TMDB** — likely spam, duplicates, or test entries. This dataset removes them.

| | Count |
|--|--|
| asaniczka snapshot (v11, ~2023) | 1,382,594 |
| Deleted from TMDB since snapshot | −214,017 |
| New movies added after snapshot | +1,429 |
| **This dataset** | **1,169,756** |

### How it's built

1. Download TMDB daily export (`files.tmdb.org/p/exports/movie_ids_*.json.gz`) — the canonical live movie ID list
2. Filter asaniczka snapshot to movies present in the daily export
3. Fetch full metadata for the ~1,400 new movies via `/3/movie/{id}?append_to_response=keywords`
4. Combine and sort by popularity

### Columns

All 24 original TMDB columns:

`id`, `title`, `original_title`, `release_date`, `popularity`, `vote_average`, `vote_count`, `status`, `runtime`, `budget`, `revenue`, `adult`, `original_language`, `overview`, `tagline`, `genres`, `keywords`, `production_companies`, `production_countries`, `spoken_languages`, `imdb_id`, `backdrop_path`, `poster_path`, `homepage`

### Keyword coverage

- Movies with keywords: ~284K (24.3%)
- Movies without keywords: ~886K (75.7%)

### Source code

https://github.com/bdelanghe/imdb-kaggle

### Related dataset

[TMDB Movie VAD + Emotion Intensity Scores](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/bdelanghe/tmdb-movie-vad-emotion-scores) — this dataset scored with NRC emotion lexicons.

resources.description: 1.17M TMDB movies — 26 columns (24 original + quality + theatrical), filtered to live TMDB entries only.

fields.name: quality
fields.description: Entry quality label: real_confident, real_likely, stub_legitimate, stub_uncertain, spam_likely, spam_confident. See https://www.kaggle.com/code/bdelanghe/tmdb-movie-quality-labels

fields.name: theatrical
fields.description: True = theatrical/streaming release; False = video/bonus release (from TMDB daily export video flag)

fields.name: backdrop_path
fields.description: Backdrop image path on TMDB CDN

fields.name: poster_path
fields.description: Poster image path on TMDB CDN
